source: pinned Stata covariance row/column stripe and singular pretrend probes
full_order_command: did_imputation Y unit t Ei [aw=w], controls(x1 x2) horizons(0/1) pretrends(2) minn(0) cluster(unit) maxit(1000)
singular_pretrend_command: did_imputation Y unit t Ei [aw=w], controls(x1 x2) horizons(0/1) pretrends(2) minn(0) cluster(cluster_pair) maxit(1000)
